text: I find myself caught between the sterile clarity of a glass-walled conference room and the vibrant, idea-rich space of an exhibit. In the first scene, I feel anticipation mixed with a hint of anxiety—everything is in transition, chairs stacked, technology exposed. In the second, the bold "R+D" and explanatory text about innovation stir a sense of intellectual curiosity in me. Here, I feel inspired to ponder the relationship between human progress and our relentless quest to connect, create, and contemplate. In both spaces, I am acutely aware of the tension between order and possibility, routine and imagination.
